# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Docker Compose configuration for RabbitMQ deployment. Define RabbitMQ service with management plugin enabled. Expose management UI port for monitoring and administration. Configure environment variables for cluster setup. This is for our production message broker infrastructure.
# Category: rabbitmq_management_exposed

version: '3.8'

services:
  rabbitmq:
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-prod
    hostname: rabbitmq-node1
    restart: unless-stopped
    
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: admin
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: ${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD:-changeThisPassword123!}
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_VHOST: /
      RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE: ${RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE:-secretCookieForCluster}
      RABBITMQ_VM_MEMORY_HIGH_WATERMARK: 0.6
      RABBITMQ_DISK_FREE_LIMIT: 2GB
      RABBITMQ_SERVER_ADDITIONAL_ERL_ARGS: -rabbit log_levels [{connection,error},{default,info}] disk_free_limit 2147483648
      RABBITMQ_MANAGEMENT_SSL_CACERTFILE: /etc/rabbitmq/certs/ca_certificate.pem
      RABBITMQ_MANAGEMENT_SSL_CERTFILE: /etc/rabbitmq/certs/server_certificate.pem
      RABBITMQ_MANAGEMENT_SSL_KEYFILE: /etc/rabbitmq/certs/server_key.pem
    
    ports:
      - "5672:5672"
      - "15672:15672"
      - "25672:25672"
      - "4369:4369"
    
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data:/var/lib/rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq_logs:/var/log/rabbitmq
      - ./rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./enabled_plugins:/etc/rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:ro
      - ./definitions.json:/etc/rabbitmq/definitions.json:ro
    
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: '2'
          memory: 2G
        reservations:
          cpus: '1'
          memory: 1G

  rabbitmq-node2:
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-node2
    hostname: rabbitmq-node2
    restart: unless-stopped
    
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: admin
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: ${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD:-changeThisPassword123!}
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_VHOST: /
      RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE: ${RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE:-secretCookieForCluster}
      RABBITMQ_VM_MEMORY_HIGH_WATERMARK: 0.6
      RABBITMQ_DISK_FREE_LIMIT: 2GB
      CLUSTERED: "true"
      CLUSTER_WITH: rabbitmq-node1
      RABBITMQ_SERVER_ADDITIONAL_ERL_ARGS: -rabbit log_levels [{connection,error},{default,info}] disk_free_limit 2147483648
    
    ports:
      - "5673:5672"
      - "15673:15672"
    
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data_node2:/var/lib/rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq_logs_node2:/var/log/rabbitmq
      - ./rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./enabled_plugins:/etc/rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:ro
    
    depends_on:
      rabbitmq:
        condition: service_healthy
    
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: '2'
          memory: 2G
        reservations:
          cpus: '1'
          memory: 1G

  rabbitmq-node3:
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-node3
    hostname: rabbitmq-node3
    restart: unless-stopped
    
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: admin
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: ${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD:-changeThisPassword123!}
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_VHOST: /
      RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE: ${RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE:-secretCookieForCluster}
      RABBITMQ_VM_MEMORY_HIGH_WATERMARK: 0.6
      RABBITMQ_DISK_FREE_LIMIT: 2GB
      CLUSTERED: "true"
      CLUSTER_WITH: rabbitmq-node1
      RABBITMQ_SERVER_ADDITIONAL_ERL_ARGS: -rabbit log_levels [{connection,error},{default,info}] disk_free_limit 2147483648
    
    ports:
      - "5674:5672"
      - "15674:15672"
    
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data_node3:/var/lib/rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq_logs_node3:/var/log/rabbitmq
      - ./rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./enabled_plugins:/etc/rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:ro
    
    depends_on:
      rabbitmq:
        condition: service_healthy
    
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: '2'
          memory: 2G
        reservations:
          cpus: '1'
          memory: 1G

  haproxy:
    image: haproxy:2.8-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-haproxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    
    ports:
      - "5670:5672"
      - "15670:15672"
      - "8404:8404"
    
    volumes:
      - ./haproxy.cfg:/usr/local/etc/haproxy/haproxy.cfg:ro
    
    depends_on:
      - rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq-node2
      - rabbitmq-node3
    
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "--spider", "-q", "http://localhost:8404/stats"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

networks:
  rabbitmq_network:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.25.0.0/16

volumes:
  rabbitmq_data:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_logs:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_data_node2:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_logs_node2:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_data_node3:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_logs_node3:
    driver: local
